settings.title: Earn Points Easily
settings.desc:
Getting rewarded has never been easier! Earn 1 point for every $1 you spend in our store. Plus, you can rack up even more points by taking simple actions:

Create an account – 5 points

Follow us on Instagram – 10 points

Like our Facebook page – 10 points

Share our store on Facebook – 10 points

Complete your profile (including gender and birthday) – 10 points

Start earning today and watch your points add up with every interaction.

settings.title: Redeem Rewards
settings.desc:
Your points turn into real savings! Once you’ve collected enough, you can redeem them for instant discounts at checkout:

150 points = $5 off

300 points= $20 off

500 points = $50 off

Just choose your reward during checkout and enjoy the perks of being part of our community.

settings.title: Join and Start Earning
settings.desc: Signing up is free and only takes a minute! Once you’ve created your account, you’ll automatically start earning points with every purchase and interaction. Make sure to complete your profile and follow us on social media to kickstart your rewards. The more you shop, share, and connect, the more you save.

settings.title: Find REWACLUB on Desktop
settings.desc: Look for the heart icon and "RewaClub" at the bottom left corner. Click to view your points and rewards.

settings.title: Find REWACLUB on Mobile
settings.desc: Look for the heart icon at the bottom left corner. Click to view your points and rewards.
